logBasedMetrics.name: ppv/entitlement_granted
logBasedMetrics.description: New entitlement writes — use for purchase funnel success rate

logBasedMetrics.name: ppv/entitlement_idempotent
logBasedMetrics.description: Idempotent entitlement replays — expected on retries, alert if > 20% of total

logBasedMetrics.name: ppv/revenue_split_calculated
logBasedMetrics.description: Revenue split calculations — one per purchase flow

logBasedMetrics.name: ppv/webhook_dlq_exhausted
logBasedMetrics.description: DLQ items that exhausted all retry attempts — page immediately

howToApply: 1. Open GCP Console → Logging → Log-based metrics
2. For each entry in logBasedMetrics above, create a metric using the filter string
3. Set label extractors as shown — these become Monitoring labels you can group by
4. After creation, metrics appear under logging.googleapis.com/user/ in Cloud Monitoring
5. Reference them in Grafana data source using stackdriver:// or Cloud Monitoring connector
6. Alternatively, run the GCP CLI commands: gcloud logging metrics create <name> --description='...' --log-filter='...'

gcpCliExample.description: Create the entitlement_granted metric via gcloud
gcpCliExample.command: gcloud logging metrics create ppv_entitlement_granted --description='New PPV entitlement grants' --log-filter='jsonPayload.metric="entitlement_granted" AND jsonPayload.service="createEntitlement"'
